Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-33936 affecting package python-ecdsa for versions less than 0.19.2-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-33936 affecting package python-ecdsa for versions less than 0.19.2-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package python-ecdsa is earlier than 0.19.2-1, affected by CVE-2026-33936
